title: Hermes Session: We need to decide whether to run a limited beta of the AI su
question: We need to decide whether to run a limited beta of the AI support assistant. The queue pressure is high, but privacy is a concern.

whatWasDecided.summary: Based on the data, the median wait time is 45 minutes. However, we must ensure any beta uses redacted transcripts to comply with privacy guidelines. I recommend a limited, redacted beta.

why.rationale: Approved the assistant's recommendation from the session.

supportingEvidence.finding: {"results": [{"title": "Q2 Queue Report", "description": "Median wait time is 45 minutes, exceeding the 15-minute target."}]}

supportingClaims.text: We need to decide whether to run a limited beta of the AI support assistant. The queue pressure is high, but privacy is a concern.

supportingAssumptions.text: The evidence gathered in this session is sufficient and current enough to act on the recommendation.

objections.text: However, we must ensure any beta uses redacted transcripts to comply with privacy guidelines.
